findings.description: The original PDF uses a dotted-leader format aligning topics with speakers in a single-column list layout, while the HTML converts this into a formal table with three columns (Time, Topic, Speaker). The structural representation has changed significantly.
findings.evidence: PDF shows a schedule with dotted lines connecting topics to speakers in a free-form layout. HTML renders this as a structured table with borders, headers (Time, Topic, Speaker), and distinct cells.

findings.description: The HTML introduces a table structure that did not exist as a formal table in the PDF. While the data is preserved correctly, the original was not a bordered table but rather a simple agenda list with dotted leaders.
findings.evidence: PDF: agenda items listed with dot leaders connecting topics to speakers, separated by a horizontal line at top. HTML: formal bordered table with header row containing 'Time', 'Topic', 'Speaker' columns.

findings.description: The title and header area formatting differs. In the PDF, the title 'French Broad Hydrologic Model' and 'Stakeholder Meeting #2' are centered and bold, with the venue and date centered below. In the HTML, these are left-aligned.
findings.evidence: PDF: centered bold title block. HTML: left-aligned bold title block.

findings.description: The PDF does not present the agenda as a table with headers; it uses a dotted-leader format. The HTML reformats it into a structured table with fabricated column headers ('Time', 'Topic', 'Speaker'). While the data content is accurate, the headers are added structure not present in the source.
findings.evidence: PDF shows agenda items in a dotted-leader list format. HTML creates a table with <th> headers: 'Time', 'Topic', 'Speaker' — these header labels do not appear in the PDF.

findings.description: The HTML has no heading elements (h1-h6) at all. The document title and meeting name are rendered as bold text within a paragraph rather than as headings.
findings.evidence:
PDF title 'French Broad Hydrologic Model / Stakeholder Meeting #2' is rendered as within a

tag instead of as an h1 or h2 heading.
